overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the bustling streets of Night City. The character moves from a covered walkway under the MedCenter building through sunlit plazas filled with diverse NPCs, palm trees, and futuristic architecture, eventually looping back toward the medical facility entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath medical facility

events.description: moving deeper into the shadowed area under the overpass with fluorescent ceiling lights becoming prominent
approaching the exit from the covered walkway into bright daylight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered teal pathway beneath the MedCenter building

notable_agents.action: character in dark outfit with distinctive pink boots walking ahead on the right side

entered.detail: large brutalist concrete medical facility with red cross signage and MedCenter branding
shadowed pedestrian passage with overhead fluorescent strip lighting and teal colored floor
futuristic red sports vehicle parked along the metal railing
illuminated vertical billboards displaying product advertisements with teal frames

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered pedestrian passage beneath the MedCenter building. The area is dimly lit with artificial ceiling lights contrasting with the bright daylight visible at the far end. A red sports car is parked to the right, and advertising posters line the left wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sunlit plaza with palm tree planters and surrounding skyscrapers

events.description: exiting the covered walkway into a bright open plaza with palm trees
emerging from shadow into bright direct sunlight causing lens flare

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza, passing large palm tree planters and approaching a curved road section

entered.detail: large rectangular concrete planters containing mature palm trees casting long shadows
tall glass and steel buildings with holographic advertisements and neon signage
asphalt street curving around the plaza edge with yellow markings

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into a bright sunlit plaza. Large palm trees in concrete planters dominate the center while futuristic skyscrapers rise in the background. The MedCenter building recedes into the distance on the right as the character moves deeper into the open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy pedestrian thoroughfare with street art and diverse crowd

events.description: entering a more crowded area with numerous pedestrians in colorful cyberpunk fashion
slight navigation adjustment to weave through oncoming pedestrians

agents.ego_description: navigating through a crowd of pedestrians wearing eclectic futuristic clothing and cybernetic enhancements

notable_agents.action: person in bright red coat with visible mechanical leg prosthetics walking past
group of pedestrians in varied attire including one with purple hair and shorts crossing the path

entered.detail: pile of blue and gray garbage bags next to a green dumpster
large vertical banners on building facade displaying product advertisements
tall pole with illuminated banner and orange base

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a moderately crowded pedestrian area with diverse NPCs in cyberpunk fashion. The ground features white graffiti markings. Trash bags and advertising billboards line the path while the MedCenter building is now visible in the distance on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza approach to medical center with public seating

events.description: crossing marked pedestrian crosswalk with yellow stripes
approaching the MedCenter entrance with large visible signage

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and continuing toward the MedCenter entrance, passing people seated on colorful benches

notable_agents.action: person with blue hair sitting on yellow bench using a tablet device

entered.detail: large building entrance with Night City MedCenter signage in red and green letters
curved yellow and green public seating with people resting and using devices
digital billboard displaying purple holographic advertisement for Samurai band

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a marked crosswalk and approaches the MedCenter entrance. Yellow benches with seated pedestrians line the path, and the MedCenter signage becomes prominently visible overhead. The environment transitions from open plaza to the structured approach of the medical facility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, sheltered corridor into a sprawling sunlit plaza before returning to the entrance of a medical facility. It begins within a covered pedestrian passage beneath the MedCenter building, where artificial ceiling lights contrast with the bright daylight visible at the far end. As the character emerges from the walkway, the scene opens into a bright plaza dominated by large palm trees and towering futuristic skyscrapers. The camera then glides through a crowded pedestrian area filled with diverse NPCs and white graffiti markings, moving past trash bags and billboards as the MedCenter building recedes into the distance. Finally, the path crosses a marked crosswalk and passes yellow benches with seated pedestrians, transitioning from the open urban space back toward the prominent overhead signage of the MedCenter entrance.
